news_items: Groton Estates: availability SURGED to 12 units (up from 1-3 units confirmed in April 2026), per grotonestates.com Playwright scrape April 12, 2026. Prices unchanged at $1,775-$2,210/mo. New news card added.

units_added.change: availability increased from 1-3 units to 12 units

details.triton-square: JS iframe - no new pricing extracted. Aggregator (HotPads) shows 1BR from $2,150-$2,346. No change vs stored (1BR $2,585 A7/A8, 2BR $3,034-$3,285). Page unchanged.
details.pleasant-valley: Playwright confirmed pricing: Studio $1,920, 1BR $2,135, 2BR $2,445. No change vs stored. Page unchanged.
details.harbor-heights: JS-rendered - Playwright confirmed page loads but prices not extractable. No change vs stored aggregator data. Page unchanged.
details.waterford-woods: Tavily confirms 1BR $1,855/mo, 12 units available (Trulia). Stored price matches. Playwright not extractable (JS/Wix). No changes.
details.groton-estates: Playwright confirmed 12 units available (was 1-3). Prices $1,775-$2,210/mo unchanged. News card added. Price history updated.
details.chester-place: Playwright confirmed $1,845/mo. $500 OFF special still active per Trulia (2 units). No change. Page unchanged.
details.emerson-place: Playwright confirmed: 1BR $1,895, 1BR Corner $1,995, 2BR $2,345. No change vs stored. Page unchanged.
details.the-ledges: Cloudflare-blocked. Aggregator data (ApartmentList, CorporateHousing): 1BR from $2,195-$2,221/mo, 13 units available. Stored 1BR $2,195 matches. No change.
details.gull-harbor: Playwright not extractable. Trulia confirms $1,675/mo, 2 units available. Stored price matches. No change.

method: Playwright primary for direct sites; Tavily search for JS-rendered/blocked properties
